basic_details.job_title: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 02-07-2026 on the official website andaman.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Management/Social Sciences/Nutrition
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Management/Social Sciences/Nutrition. Minimum 2 years work experience of capacity building with supervisory skills. Good oral and written communication skills in local language and fair skills in English. Good computer skills/knowledge of internet/email. Ability to work in a team and willingness to travel extensively. Mandatorily local candidates should be engaged.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.andaman_and_nicobar_administration: Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Management/Social Sciences/Nutrition

content_sections.heading: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Andaman and Nicobar Administration Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Graduate Degree/Post Graduate Diploma in Management/Social Sciences/Nutrition. Minimum 2 years work experience of capacity building with supervisory skills. Good oral and written communication skills in local language and fair skills in English. Good computer skills/knowledge of internet/email. Ability to work in a team and willingness to travel extensively. Mandatorily local candidates should be engaged.

content_sections.heading: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Andaman and Nicobar Administration Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Assistant position is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree or a Post Graduate Diploma in Management, Social Sciences, or Nutrition to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in the Andaman and Nicobar Administration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F. No. 2-112/POSHAN 2.0/Recruitment/ICDS (TP)/CN/2024-25/199.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Car Nicobar, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, with the pincode 744301.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific requirements for the Project Assistant role besides education?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need a minimum of 2 years of work experience in capacity building with supervisory skills, good communication skills in local language and fair English, good computer skills, and willingness to travel extensively.
